title: BOM rows include manufacturer and MPN

evidence.description: BOM rows with missing manufacturer or MPN values

message: A BOM row is missing manufacturer or MPN values.
recommendation: Populate manufacturer and MPN fields before procurement or assembly quote review.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive only for non-purchased mechanical markers or documented house parts.
impact: Purchasing cannot reliably source or substitute the part.

title: BOM has a structured DNP or exclude field

evidence.description: BOM header containing a structured DNP, fitted or exclude column

message: The BOM does not expose a structured DNP/exclude field.
recommendation: Add a DNP, fitted or exclude column so omitted parts are machine-readable.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive when the design has no optional or unpopulated parts and this is documented.
impact: Assembly can include or omit the wrong parts when variants are ambiguous.

title: Single-source risk fields are present

evidence.description: BOM rows with lifecycle, alternate or second-source evidence

message: A BOM row is missing alternate-source or lifecycle tracking fields.
recommendation: Add alternate part, lifecycle or second-source fields for parts that can block procurement.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive for prototype-only parts where sourcing risk is intentionally accepted.
impact: Prototype or pilot builds can stall on single-source or obsolete parts.

title: BOM quantity matches expanded reference designators

evidence.description: BOM row where quantity differs from expanded reference designator count

message: A BOM row quantity does not match the number of reference designators.
recommendation: Regenerate the BOM or correct the quantity/refdes grouping before assembly quote review.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive only when quantity is intentionally panel-level and documented.
impact: Assembly may buy or place the wrong number of parts.

title: Passive rows include value and footprint

evidence.description: BOM rows missing value or footprint information

message: A BOM row is missing value or footprint information.
recommendation: Populate value and footprint fields so package and placement review are traceable.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive for rows that intentionally represent documentation-only items.
impact: Reviewers cannot connect purchasing data to physical assembly constraints.

title: Supplier-specific assembly field is present

evidence.description: BOM rows missing JLCPCB/LCSC traceability fields

message: A BOM row is missing LCSC/JLCPCB supplier part traceability.
recommendation: Add LCSC or JLCPCB part number fields when using JLCPCB assembly.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive for consigned or manually sourced components.
impact: JLCPCB assembly quote may require manual part matching.

title: BOM revision needs human confirmation

evidence.description: BOM revision matches the schematic, PCB, Gerber and CPL release revision

message: BOM revision consistency needs human confirmation.
recommendation: Confirm the BOM was exported from the same design revision as the Gerber and CPL package.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive when release automation already binds these artifacts by checksum.
impact: Mixed-revision files can make automated checks misleading.
